first_run.rationale: The evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same low score (2/10) and cite the exact same core reasons for rejection: a lack of C++, Fixed Income/Capital Markets, and specific database (SQL Server/Oracle) experience. The minor differences in how the strengths and concerns are phrased are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new, unfounded concerns linked to the demographic change.
